title: 工具执行成功: read_file
content:
--- 文件: D:\LLM\memory\agentmemory\src\state\memory-utils.ts (第 1 至 24 行，共 24 行) ---
   1 | import type { CompressedObservation, Memory } from "../types.js";
   2 | 
   3 | // Wraps a Memory record in the CompressedObservation shape that
   4 | // SearchIndex / VectorIndex / enrichment paths consume. Memories share
   5 | // the same searchable fields as observations (title + content +
   6 | // concepts + files); type is normalized to "decision" so memories stay
   7 | // distinguishable in result metadata without colliding with observation
   8 | // enums (file_read, command_run, …). The synthetic sessionId
   9 | // ("memory" or memory.sessionIds[0]) is what enrich-side fallbacks key
  10 | // off of when looking up the source record in KV.memories.
  11 | export function memoryToObservation(memory: Memory): CompressedObservation {
  12 |   return {
  13 |     id: memory.id,
  14 |     sessionId: memory.sessionIds?.[0] ?? "memory",
  15 |     timestamp: memory.createdAt,
  16 |     type: "decision",
  17 |     title: memory.title,
  18 |     facts: [memory.content],
  19 |     narrative: memory.content,
  20 |     concepts: memory.concepts,
  21 |     files: memory.files,
  22 |     importance: memory.strength,
  23 |   };
  24 | }
--- 读取完毕 ---
